# clang trunk (x86): assertion "Operands with constraint "f" cannot overlap with defs" in X86 FP Stackifier for inline asm with tied input/output on x87 stack top

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173681
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, backend:X86, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-12-27T06:11:28Z

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/47sE67PTM

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

## Console
```console
clang: /root/llvm-project/llvm/lib/Target/X86/X86FloatingPoint.cpp:1689: void {anonymous}::FPS::handleSpecialFP(llvm::MachineBasicBlock::iterator&): Assertion `(1 << getFPReg(MI.getOperand(I)) & STDefs) == 0 && "Operands with constraint \"f\" cannot overlap with defs"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
```

## Code
```c
extern inline float bar(float x) {
  register long double value;
  asm volatile("frndint" : "=t"(value) : "f0"(x));
  return value;
}

float a;

float foo(float b) { return a + bar(b); }
```

## Code
```c
extern inline float bar(float x) {
  register long double value;
  asm volatile("frndint" : "=t"(value) : "f0"(x));
  return value;
}

float a;

float foo(float b) { return a + bar(b); }
```
</details>


---

### Comment 2 - keinflue

Further reduction:
```cpp
void bar(float x) {
  long double value;
  asm volatile("" : "=t"(value) : "f0"(x));
}
```

Likely duplicate of https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/172480. Also goes back to Clang 3.6 and same applies to reduction.

https://godbolt.org/z/K8MPE178x

---

### Comment 3 - keinflue

Another likely duplicate: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/53391
